message:
fix(core): return pager publication from schema reload to avoid redundant bind

bd-db300.4.5.2: After a full schema reload in the prepared-statement
path, return the already-acquired publication to the caller so the
autocommit begin path can reuse it instead of calling
bind_pager_publication a second time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
